mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT030#Sql001 */ C.BROKER_CODE, C.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE FROM ( SELECT #{req.privId} "PRIVILEGE_ID" FROM DUAL WHERE #{req.privId} ='2' ) A INNER JOIN( SELECT BRANCH_KIND FROM BRANCH WHERE BRANCH_CODE=#{req.branchCode} AND BRANCH_KIND='00' ) B ON 1=1 INNER JOIN( SELECT BROKER_CODE, BROKER_CHARGE_CODE FROM MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO ) C ON 1=1 UNION SELECT F.BROKER_CODE, F.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE FROM ( SELECT #{req.privId} "PRIVILEGE_ID" FROM DUAL WHERE #{req.privId} = '2' ) D INNER JOIN( SELECT BRANCH_KIND FROM BRANCH WHERE BRANCH_CODE=#{req.branchCode} AND BRANCH_KIND!='00' ) E ON 1=1 INNER JOIN( SELECT G.BROKER_CODE, G.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE FROM MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO G INNER JOIN BRANCH_MEDIATE_INFO H ON G.BROKER_CODE=H.BROKER_CODE AND G.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE=H.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE AND H.BRANCH_CODE=#{req.branchCode} ) F ON 1=1

SELECT /* @SQLID=FCT030#Sql004 */ C.BROKER_CODE, C.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE FROM ( SELECT #{req.privId} "PRIVILEGE_ID" FROM DUAL WHERE #{req.privId} = '9' ) A INNER JOIN( SELECT BROKER_BRANCH_KIND FROM MEDIATE_BRANCH WHERE BROKER_CODE=#{req.brokerCode} AND BROKER_BRANCH_CODE=#{req.subBrokerCode} AND BROKER_BRANCH_KIND!='00' ) B ON 1=1 INNER JOIN( SELECT D.BROKER_CODE, D.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE FROM MEDIATE_CHARGE_INFO D INNER JOIN( SELECT BROKER_ID, SUB_BROKER_ID, EMPLOYEE_ID FROM TB_MED_USERS WHERE USER_ID=#{req.userId} UNION SELECT BROKER_ID, SUB_BROKER_ID, EMPLOYEE_ID FROM TB_MED_USERS_PRIV WHERE USER_ID=#{req.userId} ) E ON D.BROKER_CODE=E.BROKER_ID AND D.BROKER_BRANCH_CODE=E.SUB_BROKER_ID AND D.BROKER_CHARGE_CODE=E.EMPLOYEE_ID ) C ON 1=1
